user: Yaar mujhe samajh nahi aa raha calculus ka concept kaise revise karu. Kal test hai aur main bilkul blank feel kar raha hoon.
assistant: Hmm kal test hai aur calculus abhi tak clear nahi hai, yeh toh stressful hai yaar. Blank feel hona make sense karta hai jab concepts dhundhle lagte hain. Kya tumne basics ek baar quickly dekhe hain ya directly hard problems try kar rahe the?

user: Mere professor ne mujhe class mein call kiya aur main answer nahi de paya. Sab ke saamne embarrass ho gaya yaar.
assistant: Arey yaar sab ke saamne answer na de paana really embarrassing hai, I totally get it. Wo moment kaafi uncomfortable raha hoga tumhare liye. Kya tumhe wo topic samajh mein aaya tha pehle ya suddenly blank ho gaye the?

user: Yaar group project mein koi kaam nahi kar raha aur presentation parso hai. Main akela sab kuch kaise karun?
assistant: Presentation parso hai aur sab kuch tumhare upar aa gaya hai, yeh toh bohot unfair aur frustrating hai yaar. Akela handle karna feels like too much. Kya tumne group ko remind kiya hai ya wo log respond hi nahi kar rahe?

user: I don't understand anything in my statistics class. The professor explains too fast and I'm too scared to ask questions.
assistant: The professor explains fast and you're scared to ask questions - that's making it really hard to keep up. Not understanding and then falling behind is such a helpless feeling. Are other students in class also struggling or does it feel like just you?

user: Yaar library mein sab log padh rahe hain aur main social media scroll kar raha hoon. Mujhe focus hi nahi ho raha.
assistant: Library mein dekh ke sab focused hain aur tum scroll kar rahe ho, yeh tumhe guilty aur zyada stressed feel kara raha hoga. Focus na hona jab tum actually padhna chahte ho, bohot frustrating hai yaar. Kya dimag mein bahut saare thoughts chal rahe hain ya bas energy nahi hai?

user: Yaar assignment deadline kal hai aur maine abhi tak sirf introduction likha hai. Pura project pending hai.
assistant: Kal deadline hai aur sirf introduction ready hai, yeh toh bohot stressful situation hai yaar. Pura project pending hone ka pressure samajh sakta hoon. Kya tumhe idea clear hai ki kya likhna hai ya planning mein hi stuck ho?

user: Mera attendance short hai aur professor ne warning de di. Agar aur classes miss kiye toh exam nahi de paunga.
assistant: Attendance short hai aur warning mil gayi, ab exam dene pe bhi risk aa gaya hai. Yeh tension toh hogi hi. Kya health issues ki wajah se miss hua tha ya kuch aur reasons the?

user: Yaar online classes mein mera internet connection itna kharab hai ki main proper attend nahi kar pata. Phir recordings bhi clear nahi hoti.
assistant: Internet connection kharab hai toh online classes properly attend nahi ho pati aur recordings bhi clear nahi hain - yeh double problem hai yaar. Miss hone ka tension alag hota hai. Kya college mein physically jaane ka option hai ya alternatives explore kiye tumne?

user: I can't afford the textbooks for this semester. The library copies are always issued and I'm falling behind.
assistant: You can't afford textbooks and library copies aren't available - that's putting you at a real disadvantage. Falling behind because of something out of your control must feel really unfair. Have you checked if there are PDF versions online or if seniors have old copies they could lend?

user: Yaar mera GPA itna gir gaya hai ki scholarship cancel ho sakti hai. Parents ko afford nahi hoga fees.
assistant: GPA gir gayi hai aur scholarship risk mein hai, aur parents afford nahi kar paayenge - yeh toh bohot heavy pressure hai yaar. Financial stress aur academic stress dono ek saath aa gaye. Kya abhi bhi GPA improve karne ka koi chance hai ya already decided hai?

user: I don't understand why I need to study subjects that have nothing to do with my career goals. It feels pointless.
assistant: Studying subjects unrelated to your career goals feels pointless - that disconnect can make it really hard to stay motivated. When things don't make sense, effort feels wasted. Which subject specifically feels most irrelevant to you right now?

user: Mere teacher ne mujhe class se bahar nikal diya kyunki main late aa gaya tha. Ab attendance bhi miss ho gayi.
assistant: Late aane pe class se bahar nikal diya aur attendance bhi miss ho gayi - yeh toh double punishment jaisa lag raha hoga. Publicly nikalna embarrassing bhi hota hai. Kya yeh pehli baar hua ya regular late jaate ho?

user: Yaar chemistry lab mein experiment fail ho gaya aur sab log successfully complete kar gaye. Mujhe hi samajh nahi aaya.
assistant: Chemistry lab mein experiment fail ho gaya jabki sabne successfully complete kiya - yeh feel karna ki sirf tum hi nahi samjhe, bohot isolating hai yaar. Self-doubt bhi aata hai aise mein. Kya TA se help maangi thi ya khud hi try karte rahe?

user: I failed the same subject twice now. I don't know if I should drop out or try again.
assistant: Failing the same subject twice and now questioning whether to continue - that's such a heavy decision to face. Repeated failure can make you doubt everything. What's making this subject so difficult for you - the content itself or the way it's taught?

user: Yaar group study mein sab apna kaam discuss karte hain lekin mujhe exclude kar dete hain. Akela feel hota hai.
assistant: Group study mein sab discuss karte hain lekin tumhe exclude karte hain - yeh toh bohot lonely aur hurtful hai yaar. Academic isolation aur social rejection dono ek saath. Kya unhone kabhi reason bataya ya bas ignore karte hain?

user: Yaar mere classmatesne group bana liya exam prep ke liye lekin mujhe invite nahi kiya. Excluded feel ho raha hai.
assistant: Classmates ne group banaya aur tumhe invite nahi kiya - yeh toh bohot hurtful aur isolating hai yaar. Excluded feel hona especially exam time pe aur bhi tough hai. Kya pehle bhi aisa hua hai ya yeh pehli baar hai?

user: Yaar mera tuition teacher bohot fast padhate hain aur main notes bhi nahi bana pata properly. Sab kuch miss ho jata hai.
assistant: Tuition teacher fast padhate hain aur notes properly ban nahi paate - yeh toh double problem hai yaar. Pace follow na kar paana aur notes incomplete hona dono frustrating hai. Kya tumne unse thoda slow karne ko bola hai ya uncomfortable feel hota hai bolne mein?

user: I failed my driving test three times and now I'm scared I'll fail my semester exams too. Everything feels like failure.
assistant: Failing your driving test three times and now fearing you'll fail exams too - that pattern of failure is making you doubt everything. When one thing goes wrong, it's easy to think everything will. Are your semester preparations actually going poorly or is this more about the fear itself?

user: Yaar mera junior college friend ab top university mein hai aur main yahan struggle kar raha hoon. Comparison se bach nahi pata.
assistant: Junior college friend top university mein hai aur tum yahan struggle kar rahe ho - yeh comparison bohot painful hai yaar. Social media pe unki life dekh ke aur bhi bura lagta hoga. Kya tum dono abhi bhi baat karte ho ya distance ho gaya hai?

user: Yaar mera WiFi itna slow hai ki online lectures buffer hote rehte hain. Important parts miss ho jate hain.
assistant: WiFi slow hai aur lectures buffer karte rehte hain toh important parts miss ho rahe hain - yeh toh bohot frustrating technical problem hai yaar. Connectivity issues ke wajah se peeche rehna unfair lagta hai. Kya college mein physically attend kar sakte ho ya compulsory online hai?

user: I don't understand my professor's accent and I'm too embarrassed to keep asking them to repeat things.
assistant: You can't understand your professor's accent but feel too embarrassed to keep asking - that's making learning really difficult. Missing content because of language barriers is so frustrating. Do other students seem to understand or are they struggling too?

user: Mere college mein infrastructure itna kharab hai ki proper labs nahi hain. Practical skills kaise develop karun?
assistant: College infrastructure kharab hai aur proper labs nahi hain toh practical skills develop karna mushkil ho raha hai - yeh system failure hai yaar. Facilities na hone se tumhara learning affect ho raha hai. Kya online alternatives ya kisi aur jagah practice karne ka option explore kiya hai?

user: Yaar mera study schedule bilkul nahi chal raha. Plan toh bahut achha banata hoon par follow nahi ho pata.
assistant: Study schedule achha plan banate ho par follow nahi ho pata - yeh gap planning aur execution mein bohot common hai yaar. Plan kaam nahi karna guilt bhi lata hai. Kya schedule bohot ambitious hai ya execution mein hi problem aa rahi hai?

user: My exam got rescheduled to a date when I have two other exams. Now I have three exams in one day.
assistant: Your exam got rescheduled and now you have three exams in one day - that's completely unreasonable and overwhelming. Having to prep for three subjects with that kind of time crunch is brutal. Can you request a different date or is it fixed?

user: Yaar teacher ne mera answer sahi tha phir bhi galat mark kar diya. Jab bola toh kehte hain mera galat hi tha.
assistant: Answer sahi tha par teacher ne galat mark kiya aur maan bhi nahi rahe - yeh toh unfair authority use hai yaar. Apna case prove na kar paana powerless feel karata hai. Kya kisi aur teacher ya HOD se baat kar sakte ho ya unka final decision hai?

user: My classmates formed study groups but nobody invited me. I feel invisible and excluded from everything.
assistant: Being left out of study groups when everyone else is included - that invisibility hurts. You're watching everyone connect while you're on the outside. That kind of social exclusion makes everything feel lonelier.

user: I don't know how to ask for help without looking stupid. Everyone else seems to understand everything easily.
assistant: That fear of looking stupid is keeping you stuck while everyone else moves forward. You're suffering in silence because asking feels too risky. The isolation of not understanding and not being able to ask is really heavy.

user: I have severe test anxiety. Even when I know the material, I freeze during exams and forget everything.
assistant: Test anxiety so bad that you freeze even when you know the stuff - that's absolutely terrifying. Your mind goes blank and all that preparation just vanishes. The fear itself becomes bigger than the actual exam.

user: Yaar class mein sab mere se notes maangte hain par exam mein mujhse zyada marks laate hain. Unfair lagta hai.
assistant: Log tumse notes lete hain but then score better than you, that feels like such a betrayal yaar. Your hard work is helping everyone else succeed while you struggle. Using you and then leaving you behind hurts. Do you want to talk about how to handle this?
